settings.title: Recruit Top Talent Through Infinite Global

settings.editor: We connect UK employers and organisations with skilled, pre-screened international candidates. From sourcing to compliance, we handle the entire recruitment process so you can focus on what matters - growing your team.
We take the hassle out of international recruitment, delivering vetted candidates who are ready to contribute from day one.
Every candidate undergoes thorough background checks, skills verification, and reference validation before being presented to you.
From job description to onboarding, we manage the entire recruitment pipeline. You focus on your business while we find the right people.
We handle right-to-work checks, DBS clearances, qualification verifications, and all regulatory documentation on your behalf.
Deep understanding of health and social care, education, engineering, IT, and hospitality sectors ensures we source the right talent for your industry.
A single point of contact for your organisation. Your dedicated recruitment consultant understands your culture and hiring needs.
Reduce your time-to-hire and recruitment costs. We deliver quality candidates faster, saving you the expense of prolonged vacancies.
We specialise in sourcing qualified professionals for high-demand industries across the United Kingdom.
Nurses, care assistants, support workers, healthcare professionals, and social workers for NHS trusts and private care providers.
Qualified teachers, teaching assistants, and educational support staff for schools, colleges, and training providers.
Civil engineers, project managers, skilled tradespeople, and construction professionals for major projects and contractors.
Software developers, IT support engineers, data analysts, cybersecurity professionals, and technical specialists.
Chefs, hotel managers, food service staff, and hospitality professionals for hotels, restaurants, and event venues.
Warehouse operatives, logistics staff, agricultural workers, manufacturing personnel, and other skilled roles across the UK.
A simple, transparent process from vacancy to placement. We keep you informed at every stage.
Submit your vacancy details through our form or contact us directly with the role requirements.
We source candidates from our network, screen qualifications, and conduct initial interviews on your behalf.
We present a curated shortlist of qualified candidates and coordinate interviews at your convenience.
Full compliance checks including right-to-work verification, DBS clearance, references, and qualification validation.
We support the onboarding process and remain available for aftercare to ensure a smooth transition for both parties.

settings.title: Rigorous Vetting for Your Peace of Mind

settings.editor: We take compliance seriously. Every candidate presented to you has passed a comprehensive screening process that meets UK regulatory standards. Our robust vetting procedures ensure you receive only work-ready, fully documented professionals.
Tell us about your hiring needs and we will be in touch within 1 business day to discuss how we can help.

form_fields.placeholder: Brief description of the role, key requirements, and any specific qualifications needed...

settings.success_message: Thank you for your submission! Our recruitment team will review your vacancy and get back to you within 1 business day.

settings.title: How does the recruitment process work?

settings.editor: Share your vacancy details with us, and we handle the rest. We source candidates from our international talent pool, screen and vet them thoroughly, present you with a curated shortlist, coordinate interviews, manage compliance documentation, and support through onboarding.

settings.title: What sectors do you recruit for?

settings.editor: We specialise in health and social care, education, engineering and construction, IT and technology, hospitality and catering, and general skilled worker roles. If your sector is not listed, contact us as we may still be able to help.

settings.title: What screening do you perform on candidates?

settings.editor: Every candidate undergoes right-to-work verification, DBS and police clearance checks, qualification validation, professional reference checks, English language proficiency assessment, skills evaluation, and where required, medical fitness confirmation.

settings.title: What are the costs for employers?

settings.editor: Our fee structure depends on the type of role, volume of hires, and level of service required. Contact us for a tailored quote. We are fully transparent about costs with no hidden fees.

settings.title: How quickly can you fill a vacancy?

settings.editor: Timelines vary by role complexity and sector. For many positions, we can provide a qualified shortlist within 2-4 weeks. Urgent requirements can be prioritised. We will give you a realistic timeline during our initial consultation.

settings.title: Do you handle visa sponsorship and documentation?

settings.editor: Yes. We provide comprehensive documentation support including visa guidance, sponsorship paperwork coordination, and regulatory compliance. We work with your HR team to ensure all legal requirements are met for international hires.
Get in touch to discuss your recruitment needs. Our team is ready to help you find the right talent for your organisation.
